description: Pure stateless string/byte surface of libdogecoin. Single source of truth for python (cffi), go (cgo) and js (emscripten/n-api) bindings. All sizes mirror the macros in libdogecoin.h verbatim; do not edit by hand without re-verifying against the header.
comment_param_kinds: in=read-only scalar/string the caller provides; out=caller-allocated buffer of `size` bytes the callee fills; inout_size=size_t* the caller seeds and the callee may update; nullable_u32=const uint32_t* where NULL has semantic meaning; owned_return=heap char* the caller must release via dogecoin_free.

functions.name: dogecoin_ecc_start
functions.doc: Initialize the static secp256k1 context. Call once before any key/address/sign function.

functions.name: dogecoin_ecc_stop
functions.doc: Tear down the static secp256k1 context.

functions.name: dogecoin_free
functions.doc: Release memory returned by owned_return functions (e.g. sign_message).

functions.name: generatePrivPubKeypair
functions.doc: Generate a WIF privkey + matching p2pkh address. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: generateHDMasterPubKeypair
functions.doc: Generate an HD master key + matching p2pkh address. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: generateDerivedHDPubkey
functions.doc: Derive a child p2pkh address from an HD master key. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: verifyPrivPubKeypair
functions.doc: Verify a WIF privkey matches a p2pkh address. Returns 1 if matched.

functions.name: verifyHDMasterPubKeypair
functions.doc: Verify an HD master key matches a p2pkh address. Returns 1 if matched.

functions.name: verifyP2pkhAddress
functions.doc: Validate Dogecoin p2pkh address format. Returns 1 if valid.

functions.name: getDerivedHDAddress
functions.doc: Derive an HD address (or WIF privkey if outprivkey) at account/change/index. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getDerivedHDAddressAsP2PKH
functions.doc: Derive an HD p2pkh address at account/change/index. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getDerivedHDAddressByPath
functions.doc: Derive an HD p2pkh address by custom BIP32 path string. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getDerivedHDKeyByPath
functions.doc: Derive an HD extended key by custom path. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getAddressFromPubkey
functions.doc: Derive a p2pkh address from a hex pubkey. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getPubkeyFromPrivkey
functions.doc: Derive a hex pubkey from a WIF privkey. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: genPrivkey
functions.doc: Generate a new private key in both WIF and hex form. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getAddrFromPubkeyHash
functions.doc: Derive a p2pkh address from a pubkey hash hex. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: isTestnetFromB58Prefix
functions.doc: Return 1 if address has a testnet base58 prefix.

functions.name: isMainnetFromB58Prefix
functions.doc: Return 1 if address has a mainnet base58 prefix.

functions.name: dogecoin_p2pkh_address_to_pubkey_hash
functions.doc: Convert a p2pkh address to its pubkey hash hex. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getWifEncodedPrivKey
functions.doc: WIF-encode 32 raw privkey bytes. Void; success implied by populated buffer.

functions.name: getDecodedPrivKeyWif
functions.doc: Decode a WIF privkey to raw 32 bytes. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getHDRootKeyFromSeed
functions.doc: Build an HD master key from a BIP32 seed. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: getHDPubKey
functions.doc: Derive the extended public key from an extended private key. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: deriveExtKeyFromHDKey
functions.doc: Derive an extended private key along keypath. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: deriveExtPubKeyFromHDKey
functions.doc: Derive an extended public key along keypath (public derivation). Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: genHDMaster
functions.doc: Generate a random HD master key. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: deriveHDExtFromMaster
functions.doc: Derive an extended key from master along keypath. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: deriveBIP44ExtendedKey
functions.doc: Derive a BIP44 extended PRIVATE key. NULL account/address_index yield the partial extended key. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: deriveBIP44ExtendedPublicKey
functions.doc: Derive a BIP44 extended PUBLIC key. NULL account/address_index yield the partial extended key. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: generateEnglishMnemonic
functions.doc: Generate an English mnemonic from hex entropy and size class (e.g. "256"). Returns 0 on success.

functions.name: generateRandomEnglishMnemonic
functions.doc: Generate a random English mnemonic of size class "128"/"256". Returns 0 on success.

functions.name: dogecoin_seed_from_mnemonic
functions.doc: Derive a 64-byte BIP39 seed from mnemonic + optional passphrase. Returns 0 on success.

functions.name: dogecoin_verify_mnemonic
functions.doc: Verify a mnemonic against a wordlist. Returns 0 if valid.

functions.name: getDerivedHDAddressFromMnemonic
functions.doc: Derive a p2pkh address directly from a mnemonic at account/change/index. Returns 0 on success.

functions.name: generateHDMasterPubKeypairFromMnemonic
functions.doc: Build HD master key + address from a mnemonic. Returns 0 on success.

functions.name: verifyHDMasterPubKeypairFromMnemonic
functions.doc: Verify HD master key + address match a mnemonic. Returns 0 if matched.

functions.name: sign_message
functions.doc: Sign an arbitrary message with a WIF privkey; returns a base64 signature the caller must dogecoin_free.

functions.name: verify_message
functions.doc: Verify a signed message against an address. Returns 1 if valid.

functions.name: koinu_to_coins_str
functions.doc: Format a koinu integer as a decimal coin string. Returns 1 on success.

functions.name: coins_to_koinu_str
functions.doc: Parse a decimal coin string into koinu. Returns 0 on parse failure.

functions.name: get_p2sh_multisig_address
functions.doc: Build an M-of-N P2SH multisig address + redeem script from n compressed pubkey hexes. Returns 1 on success.
